title: Project Makeover
notes:
A retired model needs a refresher before hitting the runway! Then, celebrate a bride-to-be in our latest Timed Makeover Challenge! New cards are ready to be collected this summer while you play!

-TIMED MAKEOVER: Surprise Bachelorette!
-TIMED BONUS CARDS: Sweet Summer Cards!
-NEW MAKEOVER: Fashion Flashback!
-60 new levels!

title: Bid Master.
notes:
1. Added the "Treasure Inn: Car Auction" event. Join auctions and discover more collectibles.
2. Added the Suitcase Auction event. Explore mysterious items inside abandoned suitcases.
3. The Guild interface has been fully updated, with new Guild Base and Guild Property features.

title: Hunting Sniper : Rival
notes:
Hunting Sniper Update Notes
NEW FEATURE: Guilds are here! Join a Guild, chat with members, climb the Guild Ranking, and more.
NEW SEASON TOUR: Season Tour 26 is now live with new animals, fresh challenges, and valuable rewards.
NEW BULLETS: Discover new themed Bullets with unique attributes to sharpen your hunt.
PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Fixed known issues and improved overall game performance.

notes: Minor bug fixes. Bugs: the only thing that (almost) makes us angrier than the piggies.
